message:
feat(sqlmodel): enhanced validation, schema generation, and session management

Comprehensive improvements to the SQLModel ORM framework, expanding
validation capabilities, refining schema generation, and enhancing
session lifecycle management for better database operations.

## Core Validation (crates/sqlmodel-core/src/validate.rs) [+624 lines]
- Implemented comprehensive field validation framework
- Added constraint validators: length, range, pattern, email, URL
- Implemented custom validator registration system
- Added validation error aggregation with field paths
- Implemented conditional validation based on other fields
- Added async validation support for database lookups
- Implemented validation groups for different contexts (create, update)

## Field Handling (crates/sqlmodel-core/src/field.rs) [+135 lines]
- Enhanced field metadata with validation rules
- Added field serialization customization
- Implemented field-level encryption hooks
- Added computed field support

## Macro System
### Main Entry (crates/sqlmodel-macros/src/lib.rs) [+77 lines]
- Added validation attribute parsing
- Implemented derive macro improvements
- Added compile-time validation rule checking

### Parsing (crates/sqlmodel-macros/src/parse.rs) [+297 lines]
- Enhanced attribute parsing for validation rules
- Added support for nested field structures
- Improved error messages with source spans

## Schema Generation (crates/sqlmodel-schema/src/)
### Create (src/create.rs) [refactored, -263 lines net]
- Simplified CREATE TABLE generation
- Improved constraint handling
- Better index generation

### Expected (src/expected.rs) [refactored, -125 lines net]
- Streamlined expected schema comparison
- Improved migration diff detection

## Session Management (crates/sqlmodel-session/src/)
### Main Session (src/lib.rs) [+457 lines]
- Implemented unit of work pattern for change tracking
- Added session-scoped caching for loaded entities
- Implemented lazy loading support
- Added automatic dirty checking
- Implemented cascade operations (save, delete)
- Added session events (before/after flush)

### Change Tracker (src/change_tracker.rs) [refactored]
- Improved change detection algorithms
- Added property-level change tracking
- Implemented change history for auditing

### Flush Operations (src/flush.rs) [refactored]
- Optimized batch insert/update operations
- Improved transaction handling
- Added conflict resolution strategies

Also syncs beads issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
